ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the audio file was uploaded */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker associated with the audio file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the audio file is stored */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the audio file */,
  "recording_conditions" TEXT /* Recording conditions of the audio file */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for communication with the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the speaker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Speaker's area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the metrics */,
  "snr" REAL /* Signal-to-Noise Ratio */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural Similarity Index */,
  "pesq" REAL /* Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality */,
  "mos" REAL /* Mean Opinion Score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes made during the assessment */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the assessor */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations provided by the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor (e.g., audio engineer, researcher) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Assessor's area of specialization */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser and device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the trend */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality metrics record */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date on which the trend was recorded */,
  "average_snr" REAL /* Average SNR recorded for the file on the given date */,
  "average_psnr" REAL /* Average PSNR recorded for the file on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES quality_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)
